segments.text: Welcome to lesson five of PolishPod. In this lesson you will learn to talk about spring weather, flowers, and plan outdoor activities with a friend. You will hear a conversation between a man and a woman.

segments.speaker: man
segments.text: Dzień dobry! Jaka piękna pogoda dzisiaj.

segments.speaker: woman
segments.text: Tak, jest ciepło i słońce świeci.

segments.speaker: woman
segments.text: Wiosna jest naprawdę piękna. Co chcesz dzisiaj robić?

segments.speaker: man
segments.text: Chcę iść na spacer. A ty?
Now let us break down what you heard. You will hear each phrase in Polish, I will explain it, and then you will have a chance to say it yourself.
The woman said: it is warm. In Polish, it is warm is:
